questionHtml:
What is the IUPAC name of NiCO3?

A. nickel(II) carbonate

B. nickel carbonate

C. nickel(I) carbonate

D. nitrogen(I) carbonate

meta.title: What is the IUPAC name of NiCO3? A. nickel(II) carbonate B. nickel carbonate C. nickel(I) carbonate D. nitrogen(I) carbonate
